title: Teleshopping
desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Khilona Bana Khalnayak
desc: Tatya Vinchu, a dying gangster, transfer his soul into a doll. The ventriloquist Lakshya unknowingly brings the sinister doll into his life, leading to chaos.

title: Makkhi
desc: After reincarnating as a fly, a murderer decides to take revenge on his rival, who killed him, and teams up with a woman to destroy the killer's life.

title: Kasam Paida Karne Wale Ki
desc: Aarti's husband gets killed by his paternal uncle in order to usurp his wealth and estate. She swears on her unborn child to avenge his death.

title: I
desc: A bodybuilder and successful model plans revenge after his enemies inject him with a substance that deforms his body.

title: Agnyathavasi
desc: In a peaceful village, a police station operates for 25 years without complaints. When an incident occurs in 1997, the officers are challenged with their first major case.
